--- match_coverage_quantifiers.sql
GRAPH FinGraph
-- Quantifiers
MATCH (aq1)-[:Knows]->* (bq1)
MATCH (aq2)-[:Knows]->+ (bq2)
MATCH (aq4)-[:Knows]->{2} (bq4)
MATCH (aq5)-[:Knows]->{2,} (bq5)
MATCH (aq6)-[:Knows]->{,5} (bq6)
MATCH (aq7)-[:Knows]->{2,5} (bq7)
-- Subpath Patterns with everything
MATCH ( @{a=1} WALK (asub)-[esub]->(bsub) WHERE asub.id > 0 ){2,3}
RETURN *

--- AST
&ast.GQLGraphQuery{
  GraphClause: &ast.GQLGraphClause{
    PropertyGraphName: &ast.Path{
      Idents: []*ast.Ident{
        &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 6,
          NameEnd: 14,
          Name:    "FinGraph",
        },
      },
    },
  },
  Query: &ast.GQLMultiLinearQueryStatement{
    Statements: []ast.GQLLinearQueryStatement{
      &ast.GQLSimpleLinearQueryStatement{
        Statements: []ast.GQLPrimitiveQueryStatement{
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            Optional: -1,
            Match:    30,
            Pattern:  &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  36,
                          Rparen:  40,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 37,
                              NameEnd: 40,
                              Name:    "aq1",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
                          StartPos:  41,
                          EndPos:    52,
                          Direction: "RIGHT",
                          Filler:    &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Label:    &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              Is:    -1,
                              Colon: 43,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 44,
                                  NameEnd: 49,
                                  Name:    "Knows",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                        Quantifier: &ast.GQLSymbolQuantifier{
                          OpPos: 52,
                          Op:    "*",
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  54,
                          Rparen:  58,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 55,
                              NameEnd: 58,
                              Name:    "bq1",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            Optional: -1,
            Match:    60,
            Pattern:  &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  66,
                          Rparen:  70,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 67,
                              NameEnd: 70,
                              Name:    "aq2",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
                          StartPos:  71,
                          EndPos:    82,
                          Direction: "RIGHT",
                          Filler:    &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Label:    &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              Is:    -1,
                              Colon: 73,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 74,
                                  NameEnd: 79,
                                  Name:    "Knows",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                        Quantifier: &ast.GQLSymbolQuantifier{
                          OpPos: 82,
                          Op:    "+",
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  84,
                          Rparen:  88,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 85,
                              NameEnd: 88,
                              Name:    "bq2",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            Optional: -1,
            Match:    90,
            Pattern:  &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  96,
                          Rparen:  100,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 97,
                              NameEnd: 100,
                              Name:    "aq4",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
                          StartPos:  101,
                          EndPos:    112,
                          Direction: "RIGHT",
                          Filler:    &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Label:    &ast.GQLLabelFilter{

                              Colon: 103,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 104,
                                  NameEnd: 109,
                                  Name:    "Knows",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                        Quantifier: &ast.GQLFixedQuantifier{
                          Lbrace: 112,
                          Rbrace: 114,
                          Count:  &ast.IntLiteral{
                            ValuePos: 113,
                            ValueEnd: 114,
                            Base:     10,
                            Value:    "2",
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  116,
                          Rparen:  120,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 117,
                              NameEnd: 120,
                              Name:    "bq4",

                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            Optional: -1,
            Match:    122,
            Pattern:  &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{

                            },
                          },
                        },
                        Quantifier: &ast.GQLBoundedQuantifier{
                          Lbrace: 144,
                          Rbrace: 147,
                          Low:    &ast.IntLiteral{
                            ValuePos: 145,

                            Base:     10,
                            Value:    "2",

          &ast.GQLMatch{
            Optional: -1,
            Match:    155,
            Pattern:  &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  161,
                          Rparen:  165,

                            Variable: &ast.Ident{

                          },

                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
                          StartPos:  166,
                          EndPos:    177,
                          Direction: "RIGHT",

                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Label:    &ast.GQLLabelFilter{

                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 169,
                                  NameEnd: 174,
                                  Name:    "Knows",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                        Quantifier: &ast.GQLBoundedQuantifier{
                          Lbrace: 177,
                          Rbrace: 180,
                          High:   &ast.IntLiteral{
                            ValuePos: 179,
                            ValueEnd: 180,
                            Base:     10,
                            Value:    "5",
                          },
                          Comma: 178,
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  182,
                          Rparen:  186,

                            EmptyPos: -1,

          },
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            Optional: -1,
            Match:    188,
            Pattern:  &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  194,
                          Rparen:  198,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 195,
                              NameEnd: 198,
                              Name:    "aq7",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
                          StartPos:  199,
                          EndPos:    210,
                          Direction: "RIGHT",
                          Filler:    &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Label:    &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              Is:    -1,
                              Colon: 201,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 202,
                                  NameEnd: 207,
                                  Name:    "Knows",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                        Quantifier: &ast.GQLBoundedQuantifier{
                          Lbrace: 210,
                          Rbrace: 214,
                          Low:    &ast.IntLiteral{
                            ValuePos: 211,
                            ValueEnd: 212,
                            Base:     10,
                            Value:    "2",
                          },
                          High: &ast.IntLiteral{
                            ValuePos: 213,
                            ValueEnd: 214,
                            Base:     10,
                            Value:    "5",
                          },
                          Comma: 212,
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  216,
                          Rparen:  220,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 217,
                              NameEnd: 220,
                              Name:    "bq7",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            Optional: -1,
            Match:    258,
            Pattern:  &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLSubpathPattern{
                          Lparen: 264,
                          Rparen: 318,
                          Hint:   &ast.Hint{
                            Atmark:  266,
                            Rbrace:  271,
                            Records: []*ast.HintRecord{
                              &ast.HintRecord{
                                Key: &ast.Path{
                                  Idents: []*ast.Ident{
                                    &ast.Ident{
                                      NamePos: 268,
                                      NameEnd: 269,
                                      Name:    "a",
                                    },
                                  },
                                },
                                Value: &ast.IntLiteral{
                                  ValuePos: 270,
                                  ValueEnd: 271,
                                  Base:     10,
                                  Value:    "1",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                          Mode: &ast.GQLPathModeClause{
                            StartPos: 273,
                            EndPos:   277,
                            Mode:     "WALK",
                          },
                          Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                            Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                              &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                                Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                                  Lparen:  278,
                                  Rparen:  283,
                                  Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                                    EmptyPos: -1,
                                    Variable: &ast.Ident{
                                      NamePos: 279,
                                      NameEnd: 283,
                                      Name:    "asub",
                                    },
                                  },
                                },
                              },
                              &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                                Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
                                  StartPos:  284,
                                  EndPos:    293,
                                  Direction: "RIGHT",
                                  Filler:    &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                                    EmptyPos: -1,
                                    Variable: &ast.Ident{
                                      NamePos: 286,
                                      NameEnd: 290,
                                      Name:    "esub",
                                    },
                                  },
                                },
                              },
                              &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                                Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                                  Lparen:  293,
                                  Rparen:  298,
                                  Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                                    EmptyPos: -1,
                                    Variable: &ast.Ident{
                                      NamePos: 294,
                                      NameEnd: 298,
                                      Name:    "bsub",
                                    },
                                  },
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                          Where: &ast.Where{
                            Where: 300,
                            Expr:  &ast.BinaryExpr{
                              Op:   ">",
                              Left: &ast.Path{
                                Idents: []*ast.Ident{
                                  &ast.Ident{
                                    NamePos: 306,
                                    NameEnd: 310,
                                    Name:    "asub",
                                  },
                                  &ast.Ident{
                                    NamePos: 311,
                                    NameEnd: 313,
                                    Name:    "id",
                                  },
                                },
                              },
                              Right: &ast.IntLiteral{
                                ValuePos: 316,
                                ValueEnd: 317,
                                Base:     10,
                                Value:    "0",
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                        Quantifier: &ast.GQLBoundedQuantifier{
                          Lbrace: 319,
                          Rbrace: 323,
                          Low:    &ast.IntLiteral{
                            ValuePos: 320,
                            ValueEnd: 321,
                            Base:     10,
                            Value:    "2",
                          },
                          High: &ast.IntLiteral{
                            ValuePos: 322,
                            ValueEnd: 323,
                            Base:     10,
                            Value:    "3",
                          },
                          Comma: 321,
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLReturn{
            Return: 325,
            Items:  []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: 332,
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
GRAPH FinGraph MATCH (aq1)-[:Knows]->*(bq1) MATCH (aq2)-[:Knows]->+(bq2) MATCH (aq4)-[:Knows]->{2}(bq4) MATCH (aq5)-[:Knows]->{2,}(bq5) MATCH (aq6)-[:Knows]->{,5}(bq6) MATCH (aq7)-[:Knows]->{2,5}(bq7) MATCH (@{a=1} WALK (asub)-[esub]->(bsub) WHERE asub.id > 0){2,3} RETURN *
